hero.title: Your business replies on its own.
hero.subtitle: Atento AI handles your WhatsApp messages, knows your catalog in detail, and responds like a human — without you being there.
hero.hint: Setup in 5 minutes. No technical skills needed.
hero.urgency: LAUNCH OFFER: Only 14 spots left with frozen price.

demo.title: Demo — Atento AI
demo.greeting: Hi! I'm Atento, Atento AI's virtual assistant. Ask me how I work, about pricing, or how you can try me for free 🚀

responses.price: We have 3 plans: Starter ($59/month, 1,500 messages), Growth ($99/month, 5,000 messages) and Scale ($179/month, 20,000 messages + 2 bots). All include a 7-day free trial! Would you like to know what each one includes?
responses.how: I connect to your WhatsApp and automatically reply to your customers 24 hours a day. I learn about your business to respond as if it were you. 😎
responses.features: I can answer questions, read real-time catalogs, schedule appointments, and even close sales while you sleep.
responses.setup: It's super easy: create your account, scan a QR code with your WhatsApp, and that's it, I'm already working in 5 minutes! ⏱️
responses.free: Yes, we have a 7-day free trial. You can test how I respond to your customers without any commitment. Want the link to get started?
responses.human: If a query is too complex, I'll flag it in the panel for a human to respond. I never leave the customer hanging!
responses.default: Hi! I'm Atento AI. You can ask me about our plans, how the bot works, or about the 7-day free trial. 😊

errors.network: Oops, I had a little connection issue 😅
errors.brain: Oops, I couldn't connect to the brain. Please try again.

features.title: Everything you need,
features.subtitle: Atento adapts to your business, not the other way around.

items.title: Replies like a human
items.desc: No menus, no buttons. It understands context, remembers the conversation and responds naturally every time.

items.title: Available 24 hours
items.desc: Your competitor takes 2 hours to reply. Atento does it in 3 seconds, at 3am on Sunday. Every unanswered message is a lost sale.

items.title: Knows your catalog live
items.desc: Connects to your store and knows in real-time what's in stock, at what price, and with what features. Never makes up a price.

items.title: Learns your business rules
items.desc: You tell it how your store works, your sales conditions, your policies. It applies them in every conversation.

items.title: Turns inquiries into sales
items.desc: It doesn't just inform — it guides customers toward purchase. Suggests products, calculates prices and closes the deal when the customer is ready.

items.title: Full control from your panel
items.desc: Modify the bot's behavior, update the catalog and review metrics from a simple dashboard. You decide how it responds.

items.bad: You lose sales while you sleep
You quote prices you don't have

items.good: Only see the ones that need you

items.bad: Fixed staff cost even with no sales

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Sign up with your email in under 60 seconds.

steps.title: Configure the bot
steps.desc: Tell it how to speak: tone, name, language, what it can and can't say.

steps.title: Connect your catalog
steps.desc: Paste your store link or Google Sheets and the bot learns it automatically.

steps.title: Scan the WhatsApp QR
steps.desc: Link your number and you're done. The bot starts replying in seconds.

items.name: Michael R.
items.text: I was worried it would feel robotic, but Atento understands context. My customers don't realize they're talking to AI. We tripled our response rate in the first month.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.text: I used to lose sales because I couldn't reply at night. Now the bot handles 3am just as well as 3pm. The overnight sales alone paid for the subscription.

items.name: James T.
items.text: What surprised me most is that it knows when something is in stock and when it isn't. It never promised a customer something we didn't have. That alone is worth the price.

items.name: Emma L.
items.text: My customers are demanding and I thought they'd notice it was a bot. Nothing. The tone I set is exactly our brand voice. Incredible results from day one.

items.name: Chris M.
items.text: I manage over 2,000 products and Atento knows all of them. Price, availability, description. My sales team now focuses on closing the big orders.

items.name: Laura P.
items.text: Within two weeks I'd already recovered what I paid. Customers message, the bot replies, I just confirm the order. I can't believe I didn't have this before.

pricing.title: Simple plans,
pricing.trialInfo: All plans include a 7-day free trial.
pricing.agencyPrompt: Multiple businesses? Ask about the Agency plan →

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes, no contracts or penalties. Cancel from your dashboard at any time.

items.q: What happens if I exceed the message limit?
items.a: We'll notify you before you reach the limit. You can upgrade or wait for next month.

items.q: Does it work with any WhatsApp number?
items.a: Works with WhatsApp Business and personal numbers. You don't need to change your current number.
Yes, at any time from your dashboard. The change takes effect immediately.

items.q: How quickly can I get it running?
items.a: In under 10 minutes. The guided setup walks you through every step until the bot is live.

cta.title: Your next sale is
cta.subtitle: Start today. Your bot is live in 5 minutes.
cta.trust: 7 days free · Card required for verification · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The employee that never fails. Available 24/7, knows your business in detail, and responds like a human.

errors.connection: Could not connect to the server.

qr.title: Scan QR
qr.instructions: Open WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device and scan this QR code.

platform.label: PLATFORM
platform.title: Designed for
platform.speedDesc: While manual support averages a 2-hour wait time, Atento responds in under 3 seconds — 7 days a week, regardless of the time.

dashboard.title: Your business in real-time
dashboard.desc: Metrics, conversations, and bot behavior from a simple and clear panel.

liveDemo.title: Try it now, without registering

storeLink.name: Shopify / Tienda Nube / web
storeLink.sub: Paste your store link and Atento reads the catalog when it is public

conversation.client1: Hi, do you have Nike sneakers in size 42?
conversation.bot1: Yes! We have Air Max in black and white, size 42. $94.900. Interested?
conversation.client2: The white ones, reserve them for me
conversation.bot2: Perfect! I?ll send you the payment link right now.
